annotation-query-editor.description: An {@link ExoticComponent} with a `displayName` property applied to it.

docs-tip.description: Use this to return a url in a tooltip in a field. Don't forget to make the field interactive to be able to click on the tooltip

label-param-editor.description:
Editor for label parameters that requires a Prometheus query modeller instance.
This is used by the OperationParamEditorWrapper which ensures the modeller is always provided.

prom-query-builder-container.description: This component is here just to contain the translation logic between string query and the visual query builder model.
